name: Brain CPR — revive the 4 dead brain features
branch: merged to main; deployed to production
status: DONE — all 4 brain tables go 0 -> >0, live-verified in production. FREE fix (Groq), no Gemini credits.
root_cause_was_a_stack_of_bugs: 1. The 4 writes were un-awaited fire-and-forget — dropped by the Vercel freeze (waitUntil does NOT flush from M8's legacy (req,res) handlers, even with Fluid Compute). FIX: await the writes.

2. The features never REACHED their writes: their scoring/decompose/extract ran on gemini-2.5-flash, a THINKING model whose hidden thinking ate the tiny output budget -> reply truncated BEFORE the JSON -> parseScore null / decompose n=1. FIX: non-thinking path.

3. The obvious swap gemini-2.0-flash(-lite) is RETIRED (404), and the backup Gemini key is quota-capped (429). FIX: route the secondary calls to GROQ (free, fast, non-thinking Llama, SEPARATE quota from the main Gemini answer), cerebras fallback, gemini-2.5-flash-lite last.
The brief's 'un-awaited writes' was real but only bug #1 of 3.
how_it_was_found: Vercel's log tool collapses to ~1 line/request (blind to console.log), so a TEMPORARY m8_brain_debug table + instrumentation recorded the reflector/chain decision path to a queryable table. That revealed gate_eligible->enter->score_null and the raw truncated reply 'The answer fails' (16 chars). Diagnostics + table have been REMOVED.
the_fix_files: lib/persistence.js (safePersist — waitUntil + never-throw, kept as belt-and-suspenders)
lib/entity-graph.js (extractor routed through llm.js on Groq; was a dead direct gemini-2.0-flash-lite call)
lib/memory.js (await the entity extraction, bounded 6s race — Groq ~1s)
lib/loop.js + lib/conjecture-memory.js (cron recordOutcome awaited — m8_conjecture_outcomes still needs the Lean lane / Build-B to produce leaves)
cost: $0 — all on the free providers (Groq/Cerebras). Gemini credits untouched. Turns are also FASTER (no thinking overhead, fast Groq).
tests: tests/BRAINCPR-verify.ps1 44/44 (PS static mirror; host has no Node). Live-verified in production.
reflector_scope: UNCHANGED + verified: orchestrator gates the reflector to general/knowledge lanes only (never engine/compute/fleet). The narrow gate (also excludes compound + tutor) is WHY it runs only on single general questions — by design.
remaining: m8_conjecture_outcomes stays near-0 until the Lean/M4 lane (Build-B, parallel session) produces verified/sorry leaves — Build-110 fixed that WRITE (awaited), not the leaf production. Optional future: move entity extraction to the nightly cron to drop the ~1s/turn cost.
not_touched: Bolt fleet sync (separate repo), morning brief, the 4 cron schedules. Parallel Build-B (lean lane) integrated via rebase, not clobbered.
